content_fingerprint: portkey publishes platform team guide to managing claude code cursor and codex at scale portkey has released a practical guide aimed at platform engineering teams responsible for governing multiple ai coding agents across an engineering organization portkey an ai infrastructure company has published a new guide addressing how platform teams can own and manage ai coding agents including anthropic s claude code cursor and openai s codex across their engineering organization the guide titled who owns claude code at your company a platform team s guide to managing coding agents at scale was author
